# GitHub Copilot instructions

The agent instructions for this repository are universal and live in
[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root — **read it first and follow it.**

This file is only a pointer so the same guidance applies across Claude, GitHub Copilot, Codex, and other
agents. Do not add separate rules here; edit `AGENTS.md` instead.

Key rule to remember while you work: the docs are **layered and bidirectional** — when you change a
`README.md`, an `ai/*.md` guide, a `docs/*.md` note, or a public signature, update its counterparts in
the other layers so they stay in sync. The full rule and the "when you touch X, also update Y" table are
in `AGENTS.md` §1.
